chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1796 of 2019 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, i.e. 02.05.2023. Since two years have passed and no sincere efforts were made to proceed with the matter, which reflects that the petitioner is not interested in pursuing the same. Under these circumstances, the instant Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
